name: hay-plugin-notion
description: Notion integration — import Notion pages and database entries as documents into Hay's knowledge base
author: Hay

apiToken.label: Internal Integration Token
apiToken.helpText: Create an internal integration at notion.so/my-integrations, then share the pages/databases you want to import with it. The token starts with 'ntn_' or 'secret_'.

notionVersion.label: Notion API version
notionVersion.helpText: The Notion-Version header sent with every request. Leave the default unless Notion deprecates it.
